name: LogisticDistribution
javadoc: /** * This class implements the Logistic distribution. * * @see Logistic Distribution (Wikipedia) * @see Logistic Distribution (Mathworld) * * @since 3.4 */

members.javadoc:
/** * Build a new instance. *

* Note: this constructor will implicitly create an instance of * {@link Well19937c} as random generator to be used for sampling only (see * {@link #sample()} and {@link #sample(int)}). In case no sampling is * needed for the created distribution, it is advised to pass {@code null} * as random generator via the appropriate constructors to avoid the * additional initialisation overhead. * * @param mu location parameter * @param s scale parameter (must be positive) * @throws NotStrictlyPositiveException if {@code beta <= 0} */
